title: Quantum-crystalline armor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Citation}}
'''Quantum-crystalline armor,''' also known as '''layered molecular armor''' and more informally known as '''quantum armor''', was a defense mechanism designed to be an impenetrable defense. The [[Armor/Legends|armor]] was designed to protect the [[Sun Crusher]].

==Characteristics==
Quantum-crystalline armor was a virtually impregnable [[Armor/Legends|armor]] plating design to protect the [[Sun Crusher]]. The armor was constructed of several layers of densely packed atoms, which was laminated and then layered onto another thin film. The film was experimentally phase sifted, and was as durable as the primary layer of armor. The armor was strong enough to theoretically allow the Sun Crusher to survive being caught in the explosion of its own [[resonance torpedo]]es.<ref name="EGWT">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>

==History==
Quantum-crystalline was specifically developed for use on the [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] known as the [[Sun Crusher]] by the scientists of the [[Maw Installation]]. The armor's strength would allow the Sun Crusher to survive the force of a supernova, which the weapon was designed to trigger.

When they discovered the secret facility in the middle of the [[Maw Cluster/Legends|Maw Cluster]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Kyp Durron]], and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] were detained by the local [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] authorities. After enlisting the help of the Sun Crusher's designer, Dr. [[Qwi Xux]], they escaped with the Sun Crusher. Solo took the opportunity to test the quantum armor's strength by ramming the Sun Crusher into the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] [[Hydra (Imperial I-class)|''Hydra''{{'s}}]] bridge. The Sun Crusher came out the other side, apparently unscathed.

After deciding that such a weapon didn't fit with its principles, the New Republic disposed of the Sun Crusher within the atmosphere of the gas giant [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]], believing that the extreme pressure will succeed in destroying it, but the material was resistant to this too. Later, under the influence of the spirit of the ancient [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]], Kyp Durron extracted the Sun Crusher from Yavin's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. The quantum armor had held up to the extreme pressures of the gas giant. Durron then took the Sun Crusher on a murderous rampage. Kyp later claimed that he could have retrieved the Sun Crusher just as easily if it had been disposed of in [[Yavin/Legends|Yavin's sun]] instead. The Sun Crusher's armor held strong despite the abuse that it was being put through. However, a [[Corusca gem/Legends|Corusca gem]] traveling at extremely fast speeds within the atmosphere of Yavin managed to put a dent in the armor of the ''[[Fast Hand]]'', which was equipped with such armor.

After the incident, Dr. Xux gave the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] the Sun Crusher's technical data and other information. The data on quantum-crystalline armor was also used to rebuild the [[Cathedral of Winds/Legends|Cathedral of Winds]].
